title: Overlay: Compass Light Biome Season & More
description: Information overlay with time, foot level, biome, light level, season and hud compass.
body:
A Minecraft 1.18.2+ mod to provide a simple text overlay. With time, light level, foot level and current biome.

## Text Overlay Options
 * Time
 * Light Level
 * Foot Level
 * Biome
 * Season (via Serene Seasons)
 
![Text Overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aY8vAgyv/images/6358d44be43603cfb77508401c2cb7a833698c08.png)

## Hud Compass
A hud compass is included. For more of an immersion experience, rather than staring at a mini-map.

![HUD Compass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aY8vAgyv/images/b751c4a09ae1600ce9e13af3c1040ccba2f11530.png)

 * Location Indicator: ·
 * World Spawn Indicator: ⊙
 * Respawn Indicator: ⌂
 * Last Death Indicator: ✕
